characters.name: Bella's Granny
characters.description: Betty is Bella's Granny (Gran), and a Character first seen inJake and the Beanstalk. She was sometimes seen in few episodes, and she is many times mentioned byBellain the series. It is unknown who her partner or daughter is, as Bella's Grandad named Peter, Mum or Dad names Bridget and Nigel are never seen or mentioned.

characters.name: Eddie the Dream Genie
characters.description: Eddie is a dream genie and a character who helps theTweeniesto sleep, he visits every night to lose their fears. His skin is blue, the same color asBella, and has ginger hair. His favourite colour is yellow. He lives inMax's lamp and he comes out when they turn it on. He appears inNight-Time MagicandJungle Adventure.

characters.name: Fizz's Dad
characters.description: Felix is Fizz's Dad and a Character first seen in the end ofJake and the Beanstalk. He was rarely seen throughout the entire series. However he is mentioned in some episodes byFizz, and byEddiein the episode,Night-Time Magic. He is one of the very few male characters with visible eyelashes, and also one of the few Tweenies parents who has a partner, asFionais seen inJake and the Beanstalktoo.

characters.name: Fizz's Mum
characters.description: Fiona is Fizz's Mum and a Character first seen inJake and the Beanstalk.She was rarely seen throughout the entire series, but she was mentioned many times byFizzin the show and her voice was heard in the episode,Go to Sleep Fizz. She is one of the few Tweenies parents who has a partner to be seen, asFelixwas seen at the end ofJake and the Beanstalk. He was also mentioned by Fizz too.
